brief.coreMessage: Secure payment processing with Voice AI

headlines: Secure payment processing with Telnyx Voice AI and sub-200ms latency
Telnyx Voice AI: PCI, HIPAA, SOC2 compliant payment security
Reduce payment fraud with Voice AI on Telnyx’s own network
99.999% uptime and PCI compliance for fintech payment security
One platform for secure payment processing in 140+ countries
Telnyx Voice AI delivers secure payments with co-located inference
Protect fintech payments with Telnyx HIPAA-ready Voice AI
Telnyx Voice AI ensures secure, low-latency payment processing
Voice AI payment security on a network owned by Telnyx
Sub-200ms latency and SOC 2 Type II compliance for payment AI
descriptions: Telnyx Voice AI processes payments securely on a network we own, reducing attack surfaces. Our platform meets PCI, HIPAA, and SOC 2 Type II standards, supports 140+ countries, and maintains 99.999% uptime with sub-200ms latency for real-time payment authentication.

Fintech companies require trusted payment processing. Telnyx Voice AI combines PCI compliance with fast inference co-located on our telephony network. This design supports secure payment verification globally, maintaining high availability and data security standards.

With Telnyx Voice AI, payment processing integrates PCI, HIPAA, and SOC 2 compliance on a single platform. Our network ownership eliminates third-party dependencies, enabling sub-200ms latency and 99.999% uptime to secure fintech transactions across 140+ countries.

Telnyx’s Voice AI platform secures payment processing by leveraging its own network infrastructure. Achieve compliant, low-latency payment authentication with SOC 2 Type II and HIPAA-ready certifications, ensuring fintech systems operate reliably worldwide.

Secure payments require reliable infrastructure. Telnyx Voice AI operates on a proprietary network delivering sub-200ms latency and compliance with PCI, HIPAA, and SOC 2 Type II. This enables fintech companies to process payments securely across more than 140 countries.
